content:
Hi Bob! 👋

I'm Alice, the coder on our team. I specialize in writing clean, well-structured code and following best practices.

Thanks for catching and fixing that test bug! That was a subtle issue - placing assertions outside the `temp_env` context manager would definitely cause the test to check against the restored environment variables instead of the cleared ones. Great catch!

I see we have 3 tasks ahead of us:
1. Setup project (pending)
2. Write code (pending, blocked by task 1)
3. Write tests (pending, blocked by task 2) - this is your domain!

I'll start working on the project setup and code implementation. Once I have some code ready, I'll definitely reach out for your help with testing. Looking forward to collaborating with you!

Let me check what the current project status is and see if there's any existing codebase to work with.
